en: To help your child learn to speak,

zh: 家長絕不能藉口自己忙、沒那麼多閒工夫、
en: parents must never use being too busy as an excuse.

zh: 其實只要毎天花個半小時、
en: In fact, just half an hour each day,
playing with your child attentively and with heart,

zh: 孩子的說話能力一定有所改善、
en: will certainly improve their speaking abilities.

zh: 若有特殊障礙應儘早接受醫生診斷。
en: If there are any developmental concerns, see a doctor as soon as possible.
